screenshot_description: Huawei Cloud Console page with top header bar (logo, navigation tabs, region selector, search, notifications, user avatar), left sidebar with service categories (collapsible, with HOT/new badges), main content area showing resource overview stats cards and ECS instance table with search/filter and pagination
changes: Created complete Vue 3 + Vite + Element Plus project replicating Huawei Cloud Console. Custom theme overrides matching DESIGN.md: primary #0066FF, 4px border-radius, PingFang SC font, #F5F7FA background, #E8E8E8 borders. Components: HeaderBar (logo, nav tabs, region dropdown, search toggle, notification badge, user avatar), Sidebar (collapsible categories, active state with blue left border, HOT/new badges), MainView (breadcrumb, page title, overview stats grid, search bar, data table, pagination). No Pinia needed. Realistic Chinese mock data for 12 ECS instances.
